hero.status: Second-year software development student · Open to internships
about.label: 01 - About Me
about.title: Hi, I'm Esra
about.p1: I am a second-year software development student who enjoys practical work and solving problems. I am especially interested in application development, UI design, and game development with Unity.
about.p2: I have built several projects with technologies such as C#, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and the Unity game engine. In my work I focus on functionality, clear structure, and user-friendly experiences.
about.p3: My way of working is defined by initiative and a strong desire to keep learning. I enjoy improving my skills and deepening my knowledge through real projects.
about.quote: "Every bug is a chance to learn something new."
skills.label: 02 - Skills
skills.title: Technologies
projects.label: 03 - Projects
projects.title: My Work
projects.items.weather.title: SkyTunes
projects.items.weather.desc: SkyTunes is a sleek, modern web application that synchronizes your local environment with your musical vibe. By fetching real-time weather data, it intelligently curates a playlist that matches the atmospheric mood—turning a stormy afternoon into a rock session or a clear day into a happy pop party.
projects.items.educommerce.title: Eduko Web Store
projects.items.educommerce.desc: Eduko Web Store is a full-stack e-commerce application implemented with modern web technologies, focusing on the sale of education and certifications. The application provides a user-friendly interface and an efficient backend solution, enabling smooth product browsing, purchasing, and management. The project is designed to meet real service-based e-commerce needs in a scalable and reliable manner.
projects.items.edudev.title: Eduko Software Developers
projects.items.edudev.desc: The Software Developers project is a full-stack application implemented with modern web technologies, aiming to provide a clear and easily accessible source of information for those interested in software development education. The site brings together key information about the field and showcases student projects in one place. The project is designed to support information sharing, make it easier to get acquainted with the field, and highlight practical skills and project work using modern web solutions.
projects.items.unity.title: Unity Game Project (In Progress)
projects.items.unity.desc: An ongoing game development project using Unity game engine with C# programming and Krita for graphics. This project showcases skills in game development, interactive design, and digital art creation.
